hero.seoTitle: I'm a Senior React Native & Next.js Engineer

personal.intro: Mobile software engineer with 5+ years of experience in React Native and technical leadership. Specialized in TypeScript and mobile security for fintech applications.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.description: Expert in React Native development with 5+ years of experience building scalable, secure mobile applications for fintech and enterprise solutions.

items.title: Technical Leadership
items.description: Led teams of 6+ developers, managing code reviews, PR processes, and ensuring quality delivery through agile methodologies and best practices.

items.title: Mobile Security
items.description: Specialized in implementing biometric authentication, MFA, encryption, and security measures for fintech applications.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Optimized application flows and reduced operation times by 20%, improving user experience and application efficiency.

exp.title: Mobile Tech Lead
exp.description: Led mobile development of Vit by Vector, a financial marketplace (mutual funds, stocks, insurance, retirement). Managed a Scrum team of 6, reviewing 15–20 PRs/week and shipping stable bi-weekly releases. Implemented Face ID, MFA, AES-256 encryption, jailbreak/root detection and an AI chatbot. Previously built VectorApp, reducing operation times by 20%.

exp.title: Web Developer
exp.description: Built an internal portal with Angular within a Scrum team and automated mobile testing with Appium and Selenium.

exp.title: Web Developer
exp.description: Built and maintained an e-commerce platform with PayPal integration, applying UX principles that increased conversion rate by 15%.

blogDetail.subtitle: Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text.
blogDetail.body1: It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English.
blogDetail.quote: There are many variations of passages of Lorem Ipsum available, but the majority have suffered alteration in some form.
blogDetail.body2: It uses a dictionary of over 200 Latin words, combined with a handful of model sentence structures, to generate Lorem Ipsum which looks reasonable.
